metadata.description: CycleBottom risk assessment tools for crypto and stock indices

plugins.name: crypto-risk
plugins.description: Get real-time risk levels for crypto (BTC, ETH, ADA, SOL, BNB, LINK) and stock indices (DJIA, S&P 500, NASDAQ) from CycleBottom — a normalized 0-1 risk metric based on log-deviation from 365-day moving average.
